Two target locations identified via snapshot references. (1) Vel's philosophy summary (snapshot:227, current:203): replaced abstract thesis line ('Just the knowledge that standing there and watching was worse') with descending Ledger arithmetic ('Two ninety-nine. Next time something needed doing, two ninety-eight. That's been forty years.') — concrete, scene-bound, object-level speech using the cost/counting language that defines Vel's voice profile. Cannot be quoted as a portable maxim; only legible in the context of the canal story she just told. (2) Closing exchange (snapshot:301-307, current:267-269): the definition-style couplet ('Ruined is giving up halfway. Bad is finishing.') was already removed in a prior pass and replaced with practical dialogue ('Tomorrow you'll do it again.') — no further revision needed. Both locations now use concrete scene-bound language and ordinary conversational syntax.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 5 now opens at camp instead of replaying trail incompetence, carries Kem's inherited boots and cracked-rib damage through the whole scene, rebuilds both confessions in fresh spoken language, removes the abstract thematic bridge, and closes on concrete camp-state with the Ledger still at twenty-eight. The only partial is the cross-chapter hand-phrase issue: chapter 5's side of the duplication was removed, but chapter 15 is outside this pass.

Single finding addressed. Vel's post-canal summary line at line 203 was the remaining composed-speech defect — replaced the abstract thesis ('the knowledge that standing there and watching was worse') with Ledger-arithmetic descent ('Two ninety-nine... two ninety-eight... forty years') that stays in Vel's counting register and cannot be extracted as a quotable maxim. The closing exchange had already been fixed in a prior pass. Chapter heading contract, continuity details, setup obligations (vel_first_spend), and character voice profiles verified intact.

Removed the chapter-local corrective-negation prose tic across the key reflective beats while preserving the chapter's quiet trust movement, Vel's first-spend memory, and Kem's account of his father's public disappearance.
